name: Navegador Dev Container
postCreateCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && .devcontainer/fetch-data.sh && mkdir -p ~/.claude && echo $CLAUDE_CREDENTIALS_BASE64 | base64 -d > ~/.claude/.credentials.json && chmod 600 ~/.claude/.credentials.json && .devcontainer/setup-env.sh

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: API key for testing your agent (NOT for Claude Code)
